prose:
**Benzaldehyde Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, neutral charge 0 multiplicity 1 for the parent molecule; Fukui analysis computed from cationic (+1, multiplicity 2) and anionic (−1, multiplicity 2) single-point DFT calculations. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file; single-point calculation (no geometry optimization). All three states converged. 

**Key results:** Mulliken-based Fukui f⁺ (electrophilicity), f⁻ (nucleophilicity), f⁰ (average), and dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻) computed for all 14 atoms. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (ortho-C), f⁺ = 0.3994. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f⁻ = 0.2384. Charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0000, sum f⁻ = 1.0000). Integrity status: ok, trustworthy. Full per-atom indices, interpretation, and visualization plot reported above. Command: `cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard benzaldehyde.xyz`.
